name: Tomato Provencale
recipeIngredient: 2 whole Tomatoes, cut in half crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes in half crosswise and remove seeds.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet and sauté the tomatoes (cut side down) about 3 minutes.
3. Turn the tomatoes and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Sauté for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Add garlic and continue to sauté until the tomatoes are tender.
5. Place the tomatoes on a heated serving dish and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
6. Toast bread crumbs in the skillet until golden, then sprinkle over the tomatoes.
